message:
feat: Implement more TODO stubs with real functionality

- unicode_writer.zig: Call tp_dealloc for proper buffer deallocation
- picklebufobject.zig: Call PyObject_ClearWeakRefs in dealloc
- capsule.zig: Track with GC using PyObject_GC_Track
- genericaliasobject.zig: Call PyObject_ClearWeakRefs in dealloc
- unicode_format.zig: Full _PyUnicode_FormatLong implementation with
  base conversion (decimal, octal, hex), prefix handling, and precision

Reduces TODO count from 13 to 8 (5 eliminated).
